ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading symbol of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry of the instrument */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "volume_converted" REAL /* Volume of trades converted to a common unit */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the instrument */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "volume_converted" REAL /* Volume of trades converted to a common unit */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the instrument */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the user accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "target_allocation" TEXT /* Target asset allocation of the portfolio */,
  "rebalance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the portfolio should be rebalanced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio instrument */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the instrument was purchased */,
  "target_weight" REAL /* Target weight of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "actual_weight" REAL /* Actual weight of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Settlement date of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the provider's data */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the data provider (e.g., global, regional, country-specific) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data provider updates its data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, JSON) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
